m2614.description: Gate 2 execution: hourly check for approved_gate2 retirement requests. Manually advances ILM past wait_for_snapshot to begin actual deletion. Creates final audit record.

script.source: def buckets = ctx.payload.aggregations.by_index.buckets; for (def b : buckets) { def latest = b.latest_state.hits.hits[0]._source; if ('approved_gate2'.equals(latest.state)) return true; } return false;
